name: Ella B.
title: The quietest hour of my month
body: I left feeling like the week had been lifted off my shoulders. Elena listens and the pressure was perfect.

name: Amelia J.
title: The hot stone ritual is something else
body: Warm towels, a spotless room, and a therapist who genuinely cares. Pure calm.

name: Mia S.
title: Booked at midnight, reminded the morning of
body: The whole thing was effortless. I have already booked the next one.

name: Amelia J.
title: A proper reset
body: Unhurried from start to finish. The botanical products smell incredible.

name: Lucy H.
title: Sofia's facial was wonderful
body: My skin has not looked this clear in months. Calm, careful and kind.

name: Adam W.
title: Exactly what I needed
body: No rushing, no upsell. Just an hour that was entirely mine.

title: We will be back
body: We did the couples retreat for our anniversary. Ninety minutes of complete quiet.
